queries.question: Display orthodontists and periodontists who have a Bachelor of dental surgery degree in their education.
queries.sql:
SELECT Orthodontists.name
FROM Education JOIN Orthodontists ON Education.id = Orthodontists.education_id
WHERE Education.degree_name = "Bachelor of Dental Surgery"
UNION
SELECT Periodontists.name
FROM Education JOIN Periodontists ON Education.id = Periodontists.education_id
WHERE Education.degree_name = "Bachelor of Dental Surgery"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?education a :Education .
    ?orthodontists a :Orthodontists .
    ?orthodontists p:hasEducation ?education .
    ?orthodontists p:name ?name .
    ?education p:degree_name ?degree_name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?degree_name_f) = "Bachelor of Dental Surgery")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?education a :Education .
    ?periodontists a :Orthodontists .
    ?periodontists p:hasEducation ?education .
    ?periodontists p:name ?name .
    ?education p:degree_name ?degree_name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?degree_name_f) = "Bachelor of Dental Surgery")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
}
